TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Lalauran = Gaga mniq Taytung Taymarisyang ka alang Lalauran. 60 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 151 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 136 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Hangan alang alang Ra-raw-ran. Pnseanak Rarawran ga nniq Pay-wan-cu dungus kari na o knmalu bi ka dxgal hini. Nniqan Tay-tung-seyn Tay-ma-ri syang Syang-ran cun. Llbangan Wada sttu hari ka saw 700 knjisan hunac tgaan rulu qrngul Syang-ran. Nniqan llingay breenux. Pgkla ppanan rulu Tey-ru: Peapa rulu qrngul dhuq bcingan tgaan rulu Tay- ma-ri , priyux peapa Ting-tung qe-yun uxay uri o peapa haya dhuq alang Syang-ran. Mgriq rulu: Muda Nan-huwey kung-ru( Tay 9 seyn) dhuq Syang-ran- cun. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Amis, kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyan Cung-cyaw Snhiyan seuxal klgan, Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cwu-cyaw, Ceng-Yey-su-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Hangan Syang-ran sbiyaw kika nalan Tanah. Tunux siida, plalay hangan no "How-cay-ran-se", Amis Ralawdan, dungus na o"kmusa rmingaw nniqan". Ga klwaan Tanah Tunux siida, pneiyah Sin-cu, Myaw-ri thjil qnpah hini ka Khilang, iyux mluk dxgal pskari seejiq Amis kjiyax ka dhyaan. Hngkawas 1930 Tanah Tunux Ceng-fu iyux iya kmdudul knparu ka qnaqih na, wada pesthjil hunacbgurah Syang-ran ka seejiq Amia, seejiq Khilang mseupu mniq sbiyaw nniqan , kiya ka sbiyaw Syang-ran ksun. Amis thangan dxgal nii o Sasadakkan, kika nniqan smriyu qsiya"uri. Iyux smpuwan gaya Amis, Pay-wan-cu, Pey-nan kingal bgurah alang. Seejiq Pay-wan-cu plalay pusu mniq dgiyaq Sang- ran, Tanah Tunux siida iyux kmalu qmlahang, wada tnhjilan breenux ka seejiq Pay-wan cu, seejiq Lalaulan endaan empitu pxal thjil kika mniq alang Sin-syang-ran ka sayang ni ga kndadax alang Cyo- syang-ran lwaqan ka Amis gmaxan mniq hini. Yaa bi wada brah hngkawas 20 ungac bi seejiq mkla hini niqan kingal alang Pay-wan-cu ‚Üíalang Lalaulan. Siida o seejiq Pay-wan-cu ga ska Amis smiyan mlukus lukus Amis, meuyas uyas Amis, mgrig grig Amis‚Ä¶bitaq niqan kingal jiyax, Seejiq Pay-wan siida gaga wada kska smiyan iyax na Amis , mlukus lukus Amis, meuyas uyas Amis, Pay-wan-cu rrisaw tduwa brahi miying gaya dha nanaq da, kari dha nanaq, alang dha nanaq. Sayang do nasi niqan seejiq ga rmngaw eptsamac sapah pyasan, Pay-wan-cu cin-nyen-hwey siida, plalay lmnglung alang Lalaulan kana han.Alang nii gisu giman da Gisu yahun giman ka alang nii da, alang Lalaulan sayang ga ida ini pstuq mquri pnyahan mdrumuc na. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu yahan rmigaw: Cin-nyen-hwey, Tay-ma-ri cin- ceng- san, Sin-syang-ran yi-ce, alang qnpahan masu. Pusu sqyanan dxgal. Sin-syang-ran Ci-tu cang-raw cyaw-hwey.Tay-tung-syeyn Tay-ma-ri-syang sin-syang ‚Äď ran ru 13 rin 88-4 spgan. (Paah pnrhulan Dempsnhyian nuda hngkawas maspac mseupu sngkkingal lnglungan na snalu saw pnrhulan qtaan ka Pay-wan-cu.) Quri rmngaw sjiqan:Sin-syang-ran Cyaw-hwey emptabug Day-min- syung 089-780032 Teyn-c sing-syang Lutuc qnawal: 089-780848 Qtaan bnatas "Tay-tung-syeyn s"- Pnatas Amis Si-tung lmuan hangan dxgal.
S.PHON: = lalau…ĺan = gaga mniq tajtuŇč tajma…ĺisjaŇč ka alaŇč lalau…ĺan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč …ĺa-…ĺaw-…ĺan. pns…ôanak …ĺa…ĺaw…ĺan ga nniq paj-wan- ¶u duŇčus ka…ĺi na o knmalu bi ka dxgal ńßini. nniqan taj-tuŇč-s…ôn taj-ma-…ĺi sjaŇč sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶un. llbaŇčan wada sttu ńßa…ĺi ka saw *** kn…üisan ńßuna ¶ tgaan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul sjaŇč-…ĺan. nniqan lliŇčaj b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu t…ô-…ĺu: p…ôapa …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul dńßuq b ¶iŇčan tgaan …ĺulu taj- ma-…ĺi , p…ĺijux p…ôapa tiŇč-tuŇč q…ô-jun uxaj u…ĺi o p…ôapa ńßaja dńßuq alaŇč sjaŇč-…ĺan. mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: muda nan-ńßuw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu( taj * s…ôn) dńßuq sjaŇč-…ĺan- ¶un. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis, ka…ĺi paj-wan, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw snńßijan s…ôuxal klgan, ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶wu- ¶jaw, ¶…ôŇč-j…ô-su- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč ńßaŇčan sjaŇč-…ĺan sbijaw kika nalan tanańß. tunux siida, plalaj ńßaŇčan no "ńßow- ¶aj-…ĺan-s…ô", amis …ĺalawdan, duŇčus na o"kmusa …ĺmiŇčaw nniqan". ga klwaan tanańß tunux siida, pn…ôijańß sin- ¶u, mjaw-…ĺi tńß…üil qnpańß ńßini ka kńßilaŇč, ijux mluk dxgal pska…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq amis k…üijax ka dńßjaan. ńßŇčkawas **** tanańß tunux ¶…ôŇč-*u ijux ija kmdudul knpa…ĺu ka qnaqińß na, wada p…ôstńß…üil ńßuna ¶bgu…ĺańß sjaŇč-…ĺan ka s…ô…ô…üiq amia, s…ô…ô…üiq kńßilaŇč ms…ôupu mniq sbijaw nniqan , kija ka sbijaw sjaŇč-…ĺan ksun. amis tńßaŇčan dxgal nii o sasadakkan, kika nniqan sm…ĺiju qsija"u…ĺi. ijux smpuwan gaja amis, paj-wan- ¶u, p…ô-nan kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß alaŇč. s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan- ¶u plalaj pusu mniq dgijaq saŇč- …ĺan, tanańß tunux siida ijux kmalu qmlańßaŇč, wada tnńß…üilan b…ĺ…ô…ônux ka s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan ¶u, s…ô…ô…üiq lalaulan …ôndaan …ômpitu pxal tńß…üil kika mniq alaŇč sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ka sajaŇč ni ga kndadax alaŇč ¶jo- sjaŇč-…ĺan lwaqan ka amis gmaxan mniq ńßini. jaa bi wada b…ĺańß ńßŇčkawas ** uŇča ¶ bi s…ô…ô…üiq mkla ńßini niqan kiŇčal alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u *alaŇč lalaulan. siida o s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan- ¶u ga ska amis smijan mlukus lukus amis, m…ôujas ujas amis, mg…ĺig g…ĺig amis*bitaq niqan kiŇčal …üijax, s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan siida gaga wada kska smijan ijax na amis , mlukus lukus amis, m…ôujas ujas amis, paj-wan- ¶u …ĺ…ĺisaw tduwa b…ĺańßi mijiŇč gaja dńßa nanaq da, ka…ĺi dńßa nanaq, alaŇč dńßa nanaq. sajaŇč do nasi niqan s…ô…ô…üiq ga …ĺmŇčaw …ôptsama ¶ sapańß pjasan, paj-wan- ¶u ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßw…ô siida, plalaj lmŇčluŇč alaŇč lalaulan kana ńßan.alaŇč nii gisu giman da gisu jańßun giman ka alaŇč nii da, alaŇč lalaulan sajaŇč ga ida ini pstuq mqu…ĺi pnjańßan md…ĺumu ¶ na. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu jańßan …ĺmigaw: ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßw…ô, taj-ma-…ĺi ¶in- ¶…ôŇč- san, sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ji- ¶…ô, alaŇč qnpańßan masu. pusu sqjanan dxgal. sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶i-tu ¶aŇč-…ĺaw ¶jaw-ńßw…ô.taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn taj-ma-…ĺi-sjaŇč sin-sjaŇč * …ĺan …ĺu ** …ĺin **-* spgan. (paańß pn…ĺńßulan d…ômpsnńßjian nuda ńßŇčkawas maspa ¶ ms…ôupu sŇčkkiŇčal lŇčluŇčan na snalu saw pn…ĺńßulan qtaan ka paj-wan- ¶u.) qu…ĺi …ĺmŇčaw s…üiqan:sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶jaw-ńßw…ô …ômptabug daj-min- sjuŇč ***-****** t…ôn- ¶ siŇč-sjaŇč lutu ¶ qnawal: ***-****** qtaan bnatas "taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn s"- pnatas amis si-tuŇč lmuan ńßaŇčan dxgal.
S.FORM: = Lalauran = Gaga mniq Taytung Taymarisyang ka alang Lalauran. 60 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 151 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 136 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Hangan alang alang Ra-raw-ran. Pnseanak Rarawran ga nniq Pay-wan-cu dungus kari na o knmalu bi ka dxgal hini. Nniqan Tay-tung-seyn Tay-ma-ri syang Syang-ran cun. Llbangan Wada sttu hari ka saw 700 knjisan hunac tgaan rulu qrngul Syang-ran. Nniqan llingay breenux. Pgkla ppanan rulu Tey-ru: Peapa rulu qrngul dhuq bcingan tgaan rulu Tay- ma-ri , priyux peapa Ting-tung qe-yun uxay uri o peapa haya dhuq alang Syang-ran. Mgriq rulu: Muda Nan-huwey kung-ru( Tay 9 seyn) dhuq Syang-ran- cun. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Pay-wan-cu. Skari kari kari Amis, kari Pay-wan, kari Tlu. Snhiyan Cung-cyaw Snhiyan seuxal klgan, Ci-tu-cyaw, Teyn-cwu-cyaw, Ceng-Yey-su-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Hangan Syang-ran sbiyaw kika nalan Tanah. Tunux siida, plalay hangan no "How-cay-ran-se", Amis Ralawdan, dungus na o"kmusa rmingaw nniqan". Ga klwaan Tanah Tunux siida, pneiyah Sin-cu, Myaw-ri thjil qnpah hini ka Khilang, iyux mluk dxgal pskari seejiq Amis kjiyax ka dhyaan. Hngkawas 1930 Tanah Tunux Ceng-fu iyux iya kmdudul knparu ka qnaqih na, wada pesthjil hunacbgurah Syang-ran ka seejiq Amia, seejiq Khilang mseupu mniq sbiyaw nniqan , kiya ka sbiyaw Syang-ran ksun. Amis thangan dxgal nii o Sasadakkan, kika nniqan smriyu qsiya"uri. Iyux smpuwan gaya Amis, Pay-wan-cu, Pey-nan kingal bgurah alang. Seejiq Pay-wan-cu plalay pusu mniq dgiyaq Sang- ran, Tanah Tunux siida iyux kmalu qmlahang, wada tnhjilan breenux ka seejiq Pay-wan cu, seejiq Lalaulan endaan empitu pxal thjil kika mniq alang Sin-syang-ran ka sayang ni ga kndadax alang Cyo- syang-ran lwaqan ka Amis gmaxan mniq hini. Yaa bi wada brah hngkawas 20 ungac bi seejiq mkla hini niqan kingal alang Pay-wan-cu ‚Üíalang Lalaulan. Siida o seejiq Pay-wan-cu ga ska Amis smiyan mlukus lukus Amis, meuyas uyas Amis, mgrig grig Amis‚Ä¶bitaq niqan kingal jiyax, Seejiq Pay-wan siida gaga wada kska smiyan iyax na Amis , mlukus lukus Amis, meuyas uyas Amis, Pay-wan-cu rrisaw tduwa brahi miying gaya dha nanaq da, kari dha nanaq, alang dha nanaq. Sayang do nasi niqan seejiq ga rmngaw eptsamac sapah pyasan, Pay-wan-cu cin-nyen-hwey siida, plalay lmnglung alang Lalaulan kana han.Alang nii gisu giman da Gisu yahun giman ka alang nii da, alang Lalaulan sayang ga ida ini pstuq mquri pnyahan mdrumuc na. Pgkla rgrigan kwan-kwang Pusu yahan rmigaw: Cin-nyen-hwey, Tay-ma-ri cin- ceng- san, Sin-syang-ran yi-ce, alang qnpahan masu. Pusu sqyanan dxgal. Sin-syang-ran Ci-tu cang-raw cyaw-hwey.Tay-tung-syeyn Tay-ma-ri-syang sin-syang ‚Äď ran ru 13 rin 88-4 spgan. (Paah pnrhulan Dempsnhyian nuda hngkawas maspac mseupu sngkkingal lnglungan na snalu saw pnrhulan qtaan ka Pay-wan-cu.) Quri rmngaw sjiqan:Sin-syang-ran Cyaw-hwey emptabug Day-min- syung 089-780032 Teyn-c sing-syang Lutuc qnawal: 089-780848 Qtaan bnatas "Tay-tung-syeyn s"- Pnatas Amis Si-tung lmuan hangan dxgal.

…ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. ńßaŇčan alaŇč alaŇč …ĺa-…ĺaw-…ĺan. pns…ôanak …ĺa…ĺaw…ĺan ga nniq paj-wan- ¶u duŇčus ka…ĺi na o knmalu bi ka dxgal ńßini. nniqan taj-tuŇč-s…ôn taj-ma-…ĺi sjaŇč sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶un. llbaŇčan wada sttu ńßa…ĺi ka saw *** kn…üisan ńßuna ¶ tgaan …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul sjaŇč-…ĺan. nniqan lliŇčaj b…ĺ…ô…ônux. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu t…ô-…ĺu: p…ôapa …ĺulu q…ĺŇčul dńßuq b ¶iŇčan tgaan …ĺulu taj- ma-…ĺi , p…ĺijux p…ôapa tiŇč-tuŇč q…ô-jun uxaj u…ĺi o p…ôapa ńßaja dńßuq alaŇč sjaŇč-…ĺan. mg…ĺiq …ĺulu: muda nan-ńßuw…ô kuŇč-…ĺu( taj * s…ôn) dńßuq sjaŇč-…ĺan- ¶un. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis, ka…ĺi paj-wan, ka…ĺi tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw snńßijan s…ôuxal klgan, ¶i-tu- ¶jaw, t…ôn- ¶wu- ¶jaw, ¶…ôŇč-j…ô-su- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč ńßaŇčan sjaŇč-…ĺan sbijaw kika nalan tanańß. tunux siida, plalaj ńßaŇčan no "ńßow- ¶aj-…ĺan-s…ô", amis …ĺalawdan, duŇčus na o"kmusa …ĺmiŇčaw nniqan". ga klwaan tanańß tunux siida, pn…ôijańß sin- ¶u, mjaw-…ĺi tńß…üil qnpańß ńßini ka kńßilaŇč, ijux mluk dxgal pska…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq amis k…üijax ka dńßjaan. ńßŇčkawas **** tanańß tunux ¶…ôŇč-*u ijux ija kmdudul knpa…ĺu ka qnaqińß na, wada p…ôstńß…üil ńßuna ¶bgu…ĺańß sjaŇč-…ĺan ka s…ô…ô…üiq amia, s…ô…ô…üiq kńßilaŇč ms…ôupu mniq sbijaw nniqan , kija ka sbijaw sjaŇč-…ĺan ksun. amis tńßaŇčan dxgal nii o sasadakkan, kika nniqan sm…ĺiju qsija"u…ĺi. ijux smpuwan gaja amis, paj-wan- ¶u, p…ô-nan kiŇčal bgu…ĺańß alaŇč. s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan- ¶u plalaj pusu mniq dgijaq saŇč- …ĺan, tanańß tunux siida ijux kmalu qmlańßaŇč, wada tnńß…üilan b…ĺ…ô…ônux ka s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan ¶u, s…ô…ô…üiq lalaulan …ôndaan …ômpitu pxal tńß…üil kika mniq alaŇč sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ka sajaŇč ni ga kndadax alaŇč ¶jo- sjaŇč-…ĺan lwaqan ka amis gmaxan mniq ńßini. jaa bi wada b…ĺańß ńßŇčkawas ** uŇča ¶ bi s…ô…ô…üiq mkla ńßini niqan kiŇčal alaŇč paj-wan- ¶u *alaŇč lalaulan. siida o s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan- ¶u ga ska amis smijan mlukus lukus amis, m…ôujas ujas amis, mg…ĺig g…ĺig amis*bitaq niqan kiŇčal …üijax, s…ô…ô…üiq paj-wan siida gaga wada kska smijan ijax na amis , mlukus lukus amis, m…ôujas ujas amis, paj-wan- ¶u …ĺ…ĺisaw tduwa b…ĺańßi mijiŇč gaja dńßa nanaq da, ka…ĺi dńßa nanaq, alaŇč dńßa nanaq. sajaŇč do nasi niqan s…ô…ô…üiq ga …ĺmŇčaw …ôptsama ¶ sapańß pjasan, paj-wan- ¶u ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßw…ô siida, plalaj lmŇčluŇč alaŇč lalaulan kana ńßan.alaŇč nii gisu giman da gisu jańßun giman ka alaŇč nii da, alaŇč lalaulan sajaŇč ga ida ini pstuq mqu…ĺi pnjańßan md…ĺumu ¶ na. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigan kwan-kwaŇč pusu jańßan …ĺmigaw: ¶in-nj…ôn-ńßw…ô, taj-ma-…ĺi ¶in- ¶…ôŇč- san, sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ji- ¶…ô, alaŇč qnpańßan masu. pusu sqjanan dxgal. sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶i-tu ¶aŇč-…ĺaw ¶jaw-ńßw…ô.taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn taj-ma-…ĺi-sjaŇč sin-sjaŇč * …ĺan …ĺu ** …ĺin **-* spgan. (paańß pn…ĺńßulan d…ômpsnńßjian nuda ńßŇčkawas maspa ¶ ms…ôupu sŇčkkiŇčal lŇčluŇčan na snalu saw pn…ĺńßulan qtaan ka paj-wan- ¶u.) qu…ĺi …ĺmŇčaw s…üiqan:sin-sjaŇč-…ĺan ¶jaw-ńßw…ô …ômptabug daj-min- sjuŇč ***-****** t…ôn- ¶ siŇč-sjaŇč lutu ¶ qnawal: ***-****** qtaan bnatas "taj-tuŇč-sj…ôn s"- pnatas amis si-tuŇč lmuan ńßaŇčan dxgal.
